needs.statement: Minimize the likelihood of under-specifying the voltage-sag envelope such that >5% of fab tools lose wafer batches per SEMI F47 event
Minimize the likelihood of revenue-stack objective conflicting with ride-through readiness, eroding >15% of projected annual dispatch revenue
Minimize the likelihood of MV feeder capacity shortfall blocking fab load-growth by >10% of planned ramp capacity
Minimize the likelihood of fire-clearance zoning requiring >2 site-layout iterations post-permit submission
Minimize the likelihood of certification delay pushing fab COD beyond planned ramp date by >60 days
Minimize the likelihood of parallel plant-connection and process-equipment certifications adding >6 months to critical path
Minimize the likelihood of commissioning-stage energy-stack defects causing >3 module swaps before handover
Increase the ability to demonstrate sub-200 ms ride-through on the ITIC curve with documented ≥99.9% event coverage at site acceptance
needs.recalibrationNote: S raised 4→6; Piller/Hitec flywheel incumbents deliver sub-50ms in S1 fabs

needs.statement: Increase the ability to complete fab-DCS handshake testing with ≤5 SEMI-protocol discrepancies before commissioning release
Minimize the likelihood of unrecovered tool state from a voltage disturbance causing >100 wafers of lot scrap per event
needs.recalibrationNote: S raised 4→5; Piller-protected fabs show documented scrap avoidance

needs.statement: Minimize the likelihood of revenue-stack dispatch state compromising the sub-200 ms ride-through window by >1 event per quarter
Minimize the likelihood of source-transition to islanded operation exceeding 16 ms during a grid disturbance
needs.recalibrationNote: S raised 4→6; rotating-mass flywheel source transition is intrinsically <16 ms

needs.statement: Minimize the likelihood of a high-energy-density stored-energy fire event triggering >24 h fab-wide evacuation
needs.recalibrationNote: S raised 5→6; flywheel/DVR incumbents carry zero fire-risk envelope

needs.statement: Increase the ability to detect autonomy degradation >3%/year before contracted ride-through duration is breached
Increase the ability to discriminate real grid disturbances from controller false triggers to ≤1 false trip per month
Minimize the likelihood of firmware updates requiring >2 h of availability-class downtime per update
Increase the ability to produce audit-ready power-event logs so the Facility Engineer can close >95% of events without VP-Ops escalation
Increase the ability to report jointly-quantified Netzentgelte-reduction and decarbonisation savings on the annual board scorecard with ≤1 auditor line-item dispute per year
Minimize the likelihood of a high-energy-density Li-ion thermal runaway event triggering >24 h fab-wide evacuation

needs.statement: Minimize the likelihood of fire-clearance zoning adding >15 m setback that forces BESS siting outside the fab security perimeter

needs.statement: Minimize the likelihood of ambient-extreme HVAC duty cycling reducing contracted ride-through autonomy by >5% within 24 months
Minimize the likelihood of LFP cell supply disruption (CN concentration, EU Battery Reg compliance) adding >12 weeks to fab-ramp-critical COD
Minimize the likelihood of installed cost exceeding €400/kWh such that CFO capex board rejects the project despite revenue-stack model
